residuals.risk: Physical validation may be confused with permission to publish the open specification.
residuals.stop_condition: Reject any policy that makes owned hardware or physical evidence a publication requirement.

residuals.risk: A reference candidate may be mistaken for mandatory hardware.
residuals.stop_condition: Every profile must allow alternatives and remain hardware-agnostic.

residuals.risk: Specified, simulated and physically validated claims may be presented without enough scope.
residuals.stop_condition: No physical claim without an exact configuration and evidence pack; otherwise retain unverified/specified/simulated.
